name: Proactive Payment Status Notifications
description: Automated push/SMS/email notifications sent at key payment milestones: initiation, hold placement, clearance, and dispute updates.

name: In-App Payment Hold Status Page
description: Dedicated in-app screen showing real-time hold status, reason, and estimated release date for all pending payments.

name: Zelle Wrong-Recipient Recovery Flow
description: Guided in-app flow for customers who sent Zelle to the wrong recipient: instant hold attempt, recipient contact facilitation, Reg E claim initiation if applicable.

name: Digital Dispute Initiation — Reg E
description: Self-service dispute filing in mobile app and web portal for unauthorised electronic fund transfers, with automatic provisional credit tracking.

name: Wire Transfer Cutoff Reminder
description: Push notification sent 2 hours before the daily wire cutoff to customers with pending wire initiations in their session.

name: Biometric Authentication for High-Value Transfers
description: Biometric (Face ID/fingerprint) step-up authentication for wire transfers and ACH payments above defined thresholds, replacing OTP SMS for eligible devices.

name: Password Reset Self-Service
description: Fully automated online and IVR password reset flow using knowledge-based authentication or device trust, without agent involvement.

name: Real-Time Card Spend Controls
description: Customers can enable/disable card, set spend limits by merchant category, block international transactions, or pause card via mobile app in real time.

name: Digital Statement Dispute Filing — Card
description: In-app and web flow for initiating card transaction disputes directly from the statement view, with automated merchant contact and timeline tracking.

name: Fee Waiver Self-Service Tool
description: Automated fee waiver eligibility checker integrated into the fee notification screen — eligible customers receive instant waiver without calling.

name: Proactive Overdraft Alert with Cover Options
description: Real-time alert when account balance approaches zero, with in-app options to transfer funds, activate overdraft protection, or accept the overdraft.

name: Digital Rewards Redemption Hub
description: Unified rewards dashboard showing points balance, redemption options, partner offers, and redemption history in one in-app location.

name: Contextual IVR Deflection to Digital
description: IVR system identifies call intent and offers a targeted deep-link to the relevant digital feature (e.g., dispute filing, password reset) via SMS during the call.

name: Policy Exception Request Portal
description: Digital portal for customers to request policy exceptions (e.g., early CD withdrawal, Reg E outside window) with transparent decision timelines.

name: Fraud Alert Self-Resolution Flow
description: When a fraud alert fires, customer receives push notification with in-app flow to verify or deny the transaction without calling — alert cleared in real time.
